---
title: ""
page-layout: full
---

```{=html}
<!-- HERO — Cloud sunset sky -->
<section class="hero-section">

  <!-- Soft cloud texture overlay -->
  <div style="position:absolute;inset:0;background:radial-gradient(ellipse at 30% 40%, rgba(253,246,238,0.35) 0%, transparent 60%), radial-gradient(ellipse at 75% 60%, rgba(200,160,200,0.25) 0%, transparent 55%);pointer-events:none;"></div>


  <!-- Hero content -->
  <div class="hero-content">
    <img
      src="images/roo-illustration.png"
      alt="Roo illustration"
      class="hero-illustration"
      onerror="this.style.display='none'"
    />

    <h1 class="hero-name">Roo</h1>
    <p class="hero-tagline">soft mind, sharp thinking</p>

    <div class="hero-pills">
      <span class="hero-pill">☁️ fintech</span>
      <span class="hero-pill">🔍 risk & aml</span>
      <span class="hero-pill">👀 data stories</span>
      <span class="hero-pill">✨ tech + aesthetics</span>
    </div>

    <p class="hero-scroll">scroll to explore ↓</p>
  </div>

</section>

<!-- WHO I AM — brief intro between hero and projects -->
<div class="site-section" style="margin-top:4rem;margin-bottom:0;padding-bottom:0;">
  <div style="max-width:600px;">
    <p class="section-eyebrow">Hello</p>
    <h2 class="section-title" style="margin-bottom:1rem;">I'm Roopa — Roo.</h2>
    <p style="font-size:0.92rem;color:#4a5a6a;line-height:2;margin-bottom:0.8rem;">
      Masters student at SMU (MITB, Fintech track), building toward a career in
      <strong style="color:#2d3a4a;font-weight:500;">risk and financial crime              analytics</strong>, with an interest in the intersection of technology,              finance, and design.
    </p>
    <p style="font-size:0.92rem;color:#4a5a6a;line-height:2;">
      I like to build things that are useful and beautiful. Data tells us many             stories, it is a matter of perspective and that is what I like to explore.
    </p>
  </div>
</div>
